name: Andy Griffiths
description: Certified personal trainer focused on simple, effective workout plans and long-term fitness progress.
biography: I am a dedicated personal trainer with over 8 years of experience helping people transform their lifestyle and achieve their fitness goals. Throughout my coaching journey, I have supported many clients with fat loss, muscle gain, strength improvement, and building healthier daily habits. My approach focuses on personalized guidance, motivation, and creating realistic workout plans that match each person’s level and goals. I believe fitness should be simple, sustainable, and enjoyable, and I am passionate about helping others become stronger, more confident, and more consistent over time.

testimonials.name: Sarah Mitchell
testimonials.text: Andy helped me stay consistent with my workouts and I started seeing real progress after just a few weeks.

testimonials.name: Jason Carter
testimonials.text: His coaching style is very motivating and supportive. I was able to lose fat and feel much more confident.

testimonials.name: Alejandro Rodriguez
testimonials.text: The workout plans were simple, personalized, and easy to follow. I gained strength and built better habits.
